audience_policies.source_phrase: The Massachusetts Parks Pass provides visitors unlimited day-use parking access to state park facilities within the DCR that charge a parking fee, with the exception of Pilgrim Memorial, Quabbin Reservoir Boat Launch Areas, the North Point lot in Cambridge, or any on-street DCR l

coupon.source_phrase_block: The Massachusetts Parks Pass provides visitors unlimited day-use parking access to state park facilities within the DCR that charge a parking fee, with the exception of Pilgrim Memorial, Quabbin Reservoir Boat Launch Areas, the North Point lot in Cambridge, or any on-street DCR location that charges an hourly rate.
